title: microlepia scabra
intro: Microlepia scabra, also known as the Pteris fern or Chinese brake fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Microlepia scabra include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating various digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, as well as being processed into capsules or tablets for convenience.
